issues.title: VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor builder class should have additional methods to set all properties
issues.body: Currently, `order` and other properties are not able to be set by the builder.  We should deprecate most of the current constructors and use the builder.

comments.body: Agree with you. Builder a much prettier approach
@markpollack could you review please, may be some constructors shouldn't be deprecate
The ctor is now private.  While reviewing this issue one of the properties was not in the builder, this has been fixed in 6ae1c13aeefe462448c8e795200c09c69f6f8554
